allow: Bash(which openclaw 2>/dev/null || command -v openclaw 2>/dev/null || echo "not found in PATH")

Bash(ps aux | grep -i openclaw | grep -v grep; echo "---"; systemctl status openclaw 2>/dev/null || echo "No systemctl service"; echo "---"; docker ps 2>/dev/null | grep -i openclaw; echo "---"; pm2 list 2>/dev/null | grep -i openclaw)
